_publications._publicationTitle: Validity and interexaminer reliability of a new method to quantify skin neurofibromas of neurofibromatosis 1 using paper frames.

_contextSnippet: The intraclass correlation coefficient (ICC) showed excellent homogeneity/reliability between the two examiners...ICC 0.995 (0.992 – 0.997)
details: Excellent interexaminer reliability with ICC of 0.995 (95% CI: 0.992-0.997) between two examiners
